name: zeev-playground
description: Zeev-L's personal Claude Code skill marketplace — engineering, product, project, PMM and biz-dev skills referenced from curated open-source repos (backed up to my own clones).

plugins.name: agent-skills
plugins.description: Production-grade software-engineering skills (spec, plan, TDD, review, ship). Addy Osmani, via my clone.

plugins.name: gstack
plugins.description: Garry Tan's 60+ engineering skills: code review, debugging, QA, deploy, security. Via my clone.

plugins.name: awesome-pm-skills
plugins.description: 28+ AI-powered PM skills from Lenny's Podcast (menkesu). Via my clone.

plugins.name: pm-product-discovery
plugins.description: Teresa Torres discovery: opportunity-solution trees, assumption tests, interview scripts. Pawel Huryn.

plugins.name: pm-product-strategy
plugins.description: Product strategy canvases: Lean/Business-Model, Porter's, SWOT, Ansoff. Pawel Huryn.

plugins.name: pm-toolkit
plugins.description: Core PM toolkit skills. Pawel Huryn.

plugins.name: pm-execution
plugins.description: Delivery / project management: sprint planning, retros, OKRs, stakeholder maps. Pawel Huryn.

plugins.name: pm-market-research
plugins.description: Market and user research skills. Pawel Huryn.

plugins.name: pm-ai-shipping
plugins.description: Shipping AI features: intended-vs-implemented, shipping artifacts. Pawel Huryn.

plugins.name: pm-data-analytics
plugins.description: A/B test analysis, cohort analysis, SQL queries. Pawel Huryn.

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: Corey Haines' SaaS PMM + biz-dev stack: GTM/launch, positioning, pricing, sales-enablement, CRO. Via my clone.

plugins.name: x
plugins.description: Post and read tweets on X (Twitter) from Claude Code. Omri Ariav.

plugins.name: gdoc-math
plugins.description: Markdown + LaTeX to a native Google Doc with editable equations. Omri Ariav.

plugins.name: find-session
plugins.description: Search past Claude Code conversations by keyword; get session IDs. Omri Ariav.

plugins.name: setup-pulse
plugins.description: Install the claude-pulse statusline for token-usage monitoring. Omri Ariav.

plugins.name: claude-reviewer
plugins.description: Review a project's .claude/ setup against best practices. Omri Ariav.

plugins.name: skill-reviewer
plugins.description: Evaluate any skill's design quality and flag anti-patterns. Omri Ariav.
